UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FCC NATIONAL BANK ASSIGNEE OF THE FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF CHICAGO ISSUER OF FIRST CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLF, TEDDI P $3,275.63 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $188.45 INTEREST, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,237.08
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
